synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2220 Important: Oracle Linux 8 thunderbird security update
description:
[140.7.0-1.0.1]
- Fix prefs for new nss [Orabug: 37079820]
- Add Oracle prefs file

[140.7.0]

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2220

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2220.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
thunderbird-140.7.0-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
thunderbird-140.7.0-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/thunderbird-140.7.0-1.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm
